---
title: "nitrix.stats.gaussian"
generated: true
signature-hash: acd0692a924f97e5
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.gaussian` (signatures only). Replace the
skeletons with authored prose; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5).
`check_reference_staleness.py` flags this page if the underlying
signatures drift from this stub.
:::

## `kl_diagonal_gaussian` {#kl_diagonal_gaussian}

```python
kl_diagonal_gaussian(mean: Float[Array, '...'], log_var: Float[Array, '...'], *, axis: Optional[_AxisArg]=None, reduction: Reduction='sum') -> Float[Array, '...']
```

KL divergence of ``N(mean, diag exp(log_var))`` from ``N(0, I)``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `gaussian_nll` {#gaussian_nll}

```python
gaussian_nll(x: Float[Array, '...'], mean: Float[Array, '...'], log_var: Float[Array, '...'], *, axis: Optional[_AxisArg]=None, reduction: Reduction='mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```

Negative log-likelihood of ``x`` under ``N(mean, exp(log_var))``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*
